arts.ttl: Champions League Liveblog: Bayer Leverkusen-Inter, Atalanta-Real Madrid
Will Jude Bellingham play for Real Madrid against Atalanta in the Champions League today?
arts.sum: In-form midfielder Jude Bellingham is set to start Real Madrid’s crunch Champions League match-up with Atalanta today, despite exiting Los Blancos’ weekend win over Girona with an apparent leg injury . Bellingham had to be substituted after an hour of Saturday’s 3-0 LaLiga victory at Montilivi, but Madrid head coach Carlo Ancelotti was quick to calm fears over the Englishman’s fitness, telling reporters post-game: “He’s OK, he was tired in his legs - I preferred not to risk him.
